item.title: Why is Gajanand International Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 05-Mar, Gajanand International Ltd’s stock price fell sharply to ₹8.10, marking a decline of 6.36% and hitting a new 52-week and all-time low. This drop reflects a sustained period of underperformance relative to both its sector and the broader market benchmarks. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Why is eMudhra Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 05-Mar, eMudhra Ltd’s stock price fell sharply by 5.11% to close at ₹406.75, continuing a downward trend that has seen the share lose over 28% year-to-date and more than 50% over the past year, significantly underperforming the broader market benchmarks. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Why is Vishwas Agri Seeds Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 05-Mar, Vishwas Agri Seeds Ltd witnessed a sharp decline in its share price, falling 9.45% to ₹35.45, marking a new 52-week and all-time low. This significant drop reflects a broader trend of underperformance relative to both its sector and benchmark indices. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Why is BEML Land Assets Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 05-Mar, BEML Land Assets Ltd witnessed a decline in its share price, closing at ₹181.20, down by ₹1.80 or 0.98% as of 09:14 PM. This drop reflects a continuation of recent negative momentum amid broader market pressures and technical weaknesses. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Why is Anand Rathi Wealth Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 05-Mar, Anand Rathi Wealth Ltd’s stock price surged by 2.79% to ₹3,220.35, reflecting robust investor confidence driven by the company’s strong financial performance and sustained market outperformance. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Why is Ameya Precision Engineers Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 05-Mar, Ameya Precision Engineers Ltd witnessed a notable increase in its share price, rising by 4.69% to ₹101.50, reflecting robust investor interest and significant outperformance relative to both its sector and the broader market benchmarks. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Why is Mega Flex Plastics Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 05-Mar, Mega Flex Plastics Ltd witnessed a significant rise in its share price, reaching a new 52-week and all-time high of ₹141.70, marking a 4.96% increase or ₹6.70 gain by 09:13 PM. This surge reflects the company’s robust performance relative to both its sector and the broader market benchmarks. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Why is Acutaas Chemicals Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 05-Mar, Acutaas Chemicals Ltd witnessed a significant rise in its share price, closing at ₹2,246.00, up by ₹141.9 or 6.74%. This surge reflects a combination of strong financial results, impressive market performance, and heightened investor interest, positioning the stock well above key moving averages and outperforming its sector peers. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Why is Shanti Overseas (India) Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: As of 05-Mar, Shanti Overseas (India) Ltd’s stock price has continued its downward trajectory, closing at ₹6.61 with a decline of 1.2%. This fall reflects a broader pattern of underperformance driven by weak financial fundamentals and sustained negative returns relative to market benchmarks. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Why is The Grob Tea Co Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 05-Mar, The Grob Tea Co Ltd’s stock price fell sharply by 4.29% to ₹899.70, reflecting a broader trend of underperformance relative to both its sector and benchmark indices amid subdued investor participation and mixed financial results. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Why is Trigyn Technologies Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 05-Mar, Trigyn Technologies Ltd witnessed a notable decline in its share price, closing at ₹48.80, down by ₹1.24 or 2.48%. This drop marks a fresh 52-week low for the stock, reflecting a sustained period of underperformance relative to both its sector and the broader market benchmarks. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Why is Flomic Global Logistics Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 05-Mar, Flomic Global Logistics Ltd witnessed a notable decline in its share price, closing at ₹43.39, down ₹1.28 or 2.87% from the previous session. This drop reflects a continuation of the stock's underperformance relative to broader market indices and sector peers, driven by a combination of technical and volume-based factors. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Why is Dr Lal Pathlabs Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 05-Mar, Dr Lal Pathlabs Ltd witnessed a decline in its share price, falling by 1.57% to close at ₹1,337.70. This drop reflects a continuation of recent underperformance relative to both its sector and the broader market benchmarks. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Why is Tamil Nadu Petro Products Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 05-Mar, Tamil Nadu Petro Products Ltd witnessed a notable decline in its share price, falling by 1.65% to close at ₹86.00. This drop continues a recent downward trend, reflecting broader challenges in the stock’s short-term performance despite its strong longer-term gains. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Why is Cantabil Retail India Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 05-Mar, Cantabil Retail India Ltd witnessed a notable decline in its share price, closing at ₹252.55, down ₹5.45 or 2.11% from the previous close. This movement reflects a complex interplay of strong long-term fundamentals contrasted with short-term market pressures and investor behaviour. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Why is Syncom Formulations (India) Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: As of 05-Mar, Syncom Formulations (India) Ltd has experienced a notable decline in its share price, continuing a multi-day downward trend that has significantly underperformed both its sector and the broader market benchmarks. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Why is Caplin Point Laboratories Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: As of 05-Mar, Caplin Point Laboratories Ltd has witnessed a notable decline in its share price, falling by 1.73% to ₹1,621.90. This downturn reflects a broader trend of underperformance relative to market benchmarks and sector peers, despite the company’s strong operational metrics and consistent profitability. item.title: Why is Karnataka Bank Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 05-Mar, Karnataka Bank Ltd’s stock price rose sharply by 6.45% to ₹213.00, reflecting robust investor confidence driven by solid long-term fundamentals and notable outperformance against market benchmarks. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Why is Jindal Capital Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 05-Mar, Jindal Capital Ltd’s stock price fell by 0.98% to close at ₹31.34, continuing a downward trend that has persisted over recent weeks and months, reflecting both short-term underperformance and technical weakness relative to broader market benchmarks. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Why is Precision Wires India Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 05-Mar, Precision Wires India Ltd witnessed a significant rise in its share price, closing at ₹334.90 with a gain of ₹14.1 or 4.4%. This upward momentum reflects the company’s robust financial results, consistent long-term growth, and increasing institutional interest, despite some concerns over valuation metrics. Time: 5 hours ago
